ead.archdesc:
======= RMM08511Arvind Krishna Mehrotra papers8511Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
May 20152B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
literThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 19:10:58 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Arvind Krishna Mehrotra papers
Mehrotra, Arvind Krishna, 1947-
Clearing House (Publishing firm)
Bombay Poets Archive
8511
6.6 cubic feet. 6.6 cubic feet.
1960-2014. Correspondence, publications. Includes correspondence, published material and some manuscripts. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 8 (unprocessed) ======= 8 (unprocessed) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 8910731
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
August 2015
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, August 2015
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, August 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Mehrotra is a 20th century modernist poet of India, an editor, translator and literary critic. Along with Adil Jussawalla, Mehrotra formed the Clearing House, which published the works of leading figures such as Arun Kolatkar, Gieve Patel, and Dilip Chitre, among others. The "Bombay Poets" were not strictly confined to Bombay/Mumbai, but included figures such as AK Ramanujan, who lived in the United States.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence, published material and some manuscripts.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Arvind Krishna Mehrotra Manuscripts, Drafts, Personal Materials and Reviews
Series II. Publications
Series III. Other Authors and Miscellaneous
Series IV. Correspondence
SEPARATED MATERIAL
Books - cataloged individually in the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections.
de Souza, Eunice. Learn from the Almond Leaf, 2016. Signed.
Mehrotra, Arvind Krishna. Bharatmata: a prayer, 1967. Offprint from Poetry India.
Kolatkar, Arun. The Boatride, circa 1960s. Signed self-made book, with experimental paper treatment.
Kolatkar, Arun. The Policeman, 1969. 1st edition.
Cite As:
Arvind Krishna Mehrotra Papers, #8511. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
RELATED MATERIALS
Related material located in collection #8519, Adil Jussawalla papers.
Literary criticism. Poetry -- India -- 20th century. India -- In literature. Indic literature (English) -- History and criticism.

Conditions Governing Access
Boxes 3-7 closed for digitization project.Damn you/Ezra contributions32
Scope and Contents
Including Agha Shahid Ali, letters from Adil (new writing in India), Tornado #5 (expenses), letters from US PoetsReview clippings, Clearing House1977-198333Early writingslate 1960s34Drafts and manuscriptslate 1970s35-6Reviews of Damn you/ Ezra11
Scope and Contents
In Century (1966), Poetry India (1967), Manhattan Review(1966-1967)Contributions to other US, UK, and Indian magazines12-4
Scope and Contents
Includes NPW/Kruti and Tornado #4, Bombay DuckTLS with poems1978196537Poems, manuscripts and drafts2000-201315-9Songs of Kabir MSS and drafts2000212-15Shakti Chattopadhyay217History of Indian Literature in English file216History of Indian Literature in English initial stages1997218History of Indian Literature in English correspondence1996-1997219Looking for A.K. Ramanujan clippings, notes and drafts220Iowa materials, bound1971-1973221DH Law review essay materials314The Transfiguring Places drafts of poems225MSS drafts of poems that first appear under New Poems in Collected Poems1998226Copies of The Nation, MPT (17), Romanian Bulletin, all with AK Mehrotra poems or translations; Penguin News with announcement of Adil Jussawalla's "New Writing in India".41The Picador Book of Modern Indian Literature publishing information, photocopy with corrections of "The Emperor Has No Clothes".200043MSS of the Absent Traveller with AK Ramanujan's corrections/suggestions in pencil, with letters from Selby and Ramanujan198844MSS of the Absent Traveller, notes and drafts, with letter from Selby198844-5The Absent Traveller notes and drafts1988315Mehrotra's Curriculum Vitae, book selection photocopies, materials for a grant/fellowship that never came through47The Transfiguring Places proofs, drafts, letters to Ravi Dayal48-10Clippings and notes related to History of Indian Literature in English412
Scope and Contents
Includes Prathibha Nandakumar letter and photocopies of AK Ramanujan letters/poems to her.Articles and reviews received from Adil Jussawalla, including letters from Jussawalla413AK Mehrortra early chapbooks: "Woodcuts on Paper" and "Pomes, Poemes, Poemas"19671971418List of early publications, early letters to publishers, translations of poems in German1965-1976421Three early Mehrortra essays, one unpublished;, international writing program Iowa presentations and materials; Center for New Performing Arts Iowa publications1971-1973422Manuscripts1973-19771995-1996423Distance in Statute Miles typescript1981424
Conditions Governing Access
Boxes 3-7 closed for digitization project.Kabir beginnings, including signed copy of Robert Bly's chapbook "The Fish in the Water is Not Thirsty (1971), and poster for the Indian edition of "Songs of Kabir"425"All to Remember", unpublished typescript of Amit Rai (1948-1966) collected poems, prose, and letters edited by Mehrortra.1971426
Scope and Contents
Rai was one of the three editors of Damn You.The Absent Traveller drafts427Making books, including final MSS of Distance to Statute Miles1971-198251-2
Conditions Governing Access
Boxes 3-7 closed for digitization project.History of Indian Literature in English53-5After Maluk MS, Paper Aeroplane, Poems from the goof surrealist MS, Partial recall essay, Nirala MS, letters from Helsa, Gulam Sheikh, the Yaddo file, GRE scores56-8Miscellaneous press books and manuscripts610-13
Conditions Governing Access
Boxes 3-7 closed for digitization project.Address book, notebook614Genesis copies and notebook1964-196575
Scope and Contents
Two copies of Genesis, Mehrotra's first "book," produced when he was 17 (one bound, one unbound); small notebook with Siva on cover—poems, pieces, doodles.
Conditions Governing Access
Boxes 3-7 closed for digitization project.News clippings1970-197276Certificates1962-196377Series II. Publications"Imprint" Magazine, with reviewsFebruaryMay 1987111"Debonair" Magazine1981-1990112-13Joseph Bruchac publications114
Scope and Contents
Flow, Indian Mountain and Other Poems, The Road to Black MountainMiscellaneous small publications115-16
Scope and Contents
Including Row With Your Hair, Troll Songs, Zuk, Cold Mountain Press, Nights of Naomi, Let the Wild Rumpus Start, Wondering Where You Are, Westbeth Poetry"The Dolphin with the Revolver in its Teeth", "Shaded Room" (1), "Quark" (1967), "Maelstro" (1967), "Earthword" (1971), "Bear"117"The Beauties of Travel", "The Poor Devil Eire", "Llamas Allmanac", "Margins" (1975)118Journal of South Asian Literature (1974), Mahfil119"Toothpaste", "The Very First Love Letter"120"Red Crow"19721973121University of Tampa196621"The Nation", with Grace Shulman's poems and correspondence197322"Keeper's Voice"196623"Ole!" with letter from Doug Blazeg196724Klacto, Suction196725"Kolkata du Haazar"198626"Indian Horizons"198527"Contra '66" full set28Gulam Sheikh catalogue, and letter199929Vrishchik1969210"Saint Botolph's Review" #2211Weissbort's 'Home'211"Black Graphics International"211British and US little magazines, including "Intrepid" special issue on India222-23TriQuarterly 37: Going to Heaven, with a letter from Elliott Anderson1976415"Town Poems" by Ashok Chopra, an Ezra-Fakir publications, and single copy of Ezra #2416"Damn You" issues 1-6 and "An Odd Thing" by Anil Saari, a Damn You press publications417"Three" by Bogomil Gjuzel, translated by Mehrotra, Ezra-Fakir press1973419"Ezra" 1, 3-5; Fakir; "Bharatmata"; "Concrete poetry" loose sheets; twelve poems from the "Good Surrealist"; Clearing House cards and flyers420"Salt Lick" materials59Miscellaneous programs and small press books610-15Series III. Other Authors and MiscellaneousAgha Shahid Ali, Keki Daruwalla, Dilip Chitre clippings and letters38Saklatvala and Kabraji xerox copies39Dom Moraes, Arun Kolatkar, and notes on Jejuri310Adil Jussawalla, Manohar Shetty311Eunice de Souza, Vikram Seth312Jayanta Mahapatra poems, clippings, and letters313Nissim Ezekiel xeroxes, reviews, Edinburgh interlude, note on Ezekiel314Arun Kolatkar unpublished MSS of his novel 'Royan'224"Nile" poems by Tomaz Salamun, autographed typescript197242Arun's 'Sarpa Satra', Adil's poems46Copy of Adil Jussawalla "Land's End" with his corrections and letter; photocopies of Jussawalla's "Trying to Say Goodbye" and "The Right Kind of Dog"; copies of Dilip Chitre chapbooks; Mehrotra's notes on translation and unpublished interview with Vijay Kumar414Michael Lally items318Arun Kolatkar writing1964, 197478
Scope and Contents
In English, an unsewn manuscript signature of notes, poems, and sketches (1960s?); in Marathi, two manuscript signatures of poetry, hand-written and water-stained; Signed typescript of Jejuri in English, 1974.Series IV. CorrespondenceFamily Letters411
Scope and Contents
Including letters from Ved Mehra and Palash Krishna Mehrotra; letter from Arun Kolatkar's nephewCorrespondence to Leonard S. Marcus1983428Miscellaneous letters1990s316
Scope and Contents
Including letters from Adil, Manohar, Jeet, Ranjit, Allan, Pankaj (postcard about first impressions of the US)Correspondence1989-1999317Letters from writers: Adil Jussawalla, Shetty, Jayanta, Daniel Weissbort, Timothy Hyman, and others510-11Letters from friends and academics, including Bruce King, Martha Selby, and others1980s-1990s512-14Letters from Adil, Shetty, Allan Sealy, Weissbort and others61-6Miscellaneous correspondence67-9CorrespondenceUndated71Correspondence1966-196772Correspondence1971-197273Oxford University Press Correspondence199074
Scope and Contents
Three photocopied letters from Rukum Advani of OUP soliciting permission on any terms to publish Arun Kolatkar's work. ======= Series I. Arvind Krishna Mehrotra Manuscripts, Drafts, Personal Materials and ReviewsLoose Sheets, Ezra 1 and 231
